nasb.text: So when the people set out from their tents to cross the Jordan with the priests carrying the ark of the covenant before the people,

esv.text: So when the people set out from their tents to pass over the Jordan with the priests bearing the ark of the covenant before the people,

cnv.text: 人民離開帳棚出發，要過約旦河的時候，抬約櫃的祭司在人民的前面。
